ItacPersonItem.Notes: Date of death according to The library of Samuel Pepys (2004). In 1679 became curator of the scientific library in Sarotti`s house. See his biography in H. W. Robinson, Denis Papin, in Notes and Records of the Royal Society of London, Vol. 5, No. 1 (Oct., 1947), pp. 47-50.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
